brief.coreMessage: Healthcare providers need HIPAA-compliant voice AI

headlines: HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI with Sub-200ms Latency
Voice AI on a Network You Control, Not Resold
Telnyx Voice AI: 99.999% Uptime for Healthcare
Single Platform Voice AI Serving 140+ Countries
SOC 2 Type II Certified Voice AI for Healthcare
Healthcare Voice AI Meeting HIPAA and PCI Standards
Co-located Inference and Telephony for Low Latency
Trusted Voice AI with HIPAA-Ready Compliance
Voice AI with End-to-End Security and Network Ownership
One Platform, No Vendor Fragmentation for Healthcare AI
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI provides HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, and PCI compliance with sub-200ms latency by co-locating inference with telephony on our own network.
Designed for healthcare providers, our platform delivers 99.999% uptime and covers 140+ countries with a single integrated voice AI solution.
Avoid vendor fragmentation with Telnyx’s single platform voice AI that ensures HIPAA readiness and low-latency processing on a proprietary network.
Our voice AI platform supports healthcare compliance requirements and reduces latency by hosting AI inference alongside telephony infrastructure.
Telnyx’s network ownership enables secure, compliant voice AI with measurable uptime and global reach for healthcare applications.
